game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **地下城堡2: 黑暗觉醒:** 地下城堡2: 黑暗觉醒 is a hybrid simulation and dungeon exploration RPG where players manage a base, the "Sanctuary," by allocating limited population and artisans to generate resources like food and materials over time, even when offline. Players form an adventure party of up to four heroes from 6 major class systems and 50+ job types, customizing their skills and equipment before embarking on dungeon expeditions. Dungeon exploration involves navigating a map, encountering random events, traps, and evil creatures, leading to real-time combat where players manually tap ability icons to execute tactical actions. Progression involves exploring new map regions, unlocking advanced classes, and challenging other players in the Arena, which becomes accessible upon reaching Map 3.
game_info.description: Welcome to Sanctuary Quest, a dungeon exploration and base management RPG. Build your Sanctuary by managing workers to generate food and materials. Recruit heroes from different classes, equip them, and venture into dangerous dungeons filled with monsters, traps, and treasures. Use tactical combat with timed abilities to defeat enemies. Progress through multiple dungeon zones, unlock advanced hero classes, and reach the Arena at Zone 3 to achieve victory!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menus and move party in dungeons
Space: Select/Confirm actions in menus and base management
Z: Use hero abilities in combat (cycles through party members)
Shift: Speed up resource collection and combat animations
Enter: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (return to title screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic functionality test that validates all game phases work correctly. Tests navigation through menus, resource generation, hero recruitment, and dungeon entry. Ensures the game doesn't crash during normal operations and all core mechanics respond properly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Navigate through the base management screen, allocate workers to food production, wait for resources to accumulate, recruit a hero, then enter the dungeon. Move through the dungeon and engage in basic combat to validate all systems work together.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Successfully transition through all game phases (START → base management → dungeon → combat) without errors. Resource generation works, heroes can be recruited, dungeon navigation functions, and combat engages properly. Test passes when all basic interactions complete successfully.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition test that validates the complete progression path to victory. Tests efficient resource management, optimal hero recruitment and equipment, strategic dungeon exploration through all three zones, and reaching the Arena to trigger the win condition.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Maximize resource generation by allocating workers efficiently. Recruit multiple heroes with complementary abilities. Explore dungeons systematically to gain experience and loot. Equip heroes with better gear. Progress through Zone 1, Zone 2, and reach Zone 3 to unlock the Arena and achieve victory.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully reach Zone 3 and unlock the Arena, triggering GAME_OVER_WIN state. The test validates optimal resource management, effective combat strategies, and complete progression through all game content. Test passes when the win screen displays with "Arena Unlocked!" message.
